title: Report Artifact Schema
description: Validation schema for Quorum report artifacts. The body is a PALETTE of optional visual components, NOT a fixed form: only `meta` is required, every other property is an opt-in component the author selects when it fits the material. `additionalProperties:false` keeps the catalog CLOSED: authors use the established components and never invent new ones. Each component maps 1:1 to a renderer in the embedded viewer (internal/server/web/app.js); growing the catalog (e.g. a future renderer specialization) is an additive change paired with a `meta.schemaVersion` bump.

verdict.description: Front-loaded bottom line: the one-sentence conclusion. Renders as a text block at the top (layer-cake first read).

summary.description: Short context paragraph: what the reader should do or understand. Renders as a text block.

decisionSurface.description: Triage table of decision-relevant fields (recommendation, confidence, main risk, best next action, when not to follow). Renders as a key-value list. Keys are free-form to keep the surface a suggestion, not a fixed form.

callouts.description: Up to three visually distinct decision, warning, or note callouts for human attention. Renders immediately after the decision surface.

verify.description: One to four explicit uncertainty or fragility checks: what to inspect, why it is risky, and the exact check to run. Renders near the top to reduce AI-review fatigue.

keyFindings.description: Scannable findings with impact and action. Renders as a table.

diagrams.description: Small diagrams as code for flows, dependencies, state, sequence, or timelines. Mermaid diagrams render in the embedded viewer; source remains local and schema-validated.

findings.description: Audit-style findings with severity. Renders as a table; the severity column renders as a colored pill.

evidence.description: Maps a finding to its supporting location and detail. Renders as a table.

tradeoffs.description: Option comparison with upside, downside, and conditions. Renders as a table.

risks.description: Risks with impact. Renders as a table; the impact column renders as a colored pill.

actionPlan.description: Executable next steps. Renders as a table.

appendix.description: Exhaustive detail, raw logs, or expanded reasoning kept off the main reading path (progressive disclosure). Renders as a text block last. Preserve content here instead of deleting it.
